intro: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called for new social norms to address AI's societal impact, comparing necessary adjustments to how urban planning changed after automobiles became widespread. SpaceX is acquiring Cursor, an AI coding platform, for $60 billion to enhance its xAI capabilities. Tensions persist between Anthropic and the White House over Claude Fable 5's risks, potentially creating opportunities for open-source AI alternatives.

whitelist.desc: He compared such changes to how children had to stop playing in the streets after cars were invented.
